subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of Truth! Thy letter from Istanbul was received and its contents were noted in detail. How abundant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حق نامه شما از اسلامبول رسید و تفاصیل معلوم گردید چه بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
